title: phleum asperum var. annuum
intro: Phleum asperum var. annuum, also known as annual blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Annual blue grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile addition to a holistic health routine.
